titleStmt.title: SII 24.642: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 642.

summary.p: Records that Kanekaṁṭi Vallānēniṁgāru of Dāsūla-gōtra sent a certain amount of money (not specified) as an endowment for daily offerings of one dish (taḷige) to the god. A verse in Sanskrit gives the genealogy of the chief thus: Siṁga; his son, Mācha; Mācha's son Śrīvallabha, the lord of Gāndhārīgiri and Gaṅgā-taṭa.
The details of the date viz., Śaka 1411, Saumya, Srāvaṇa, śu. 11, Friday regularly correspond to 1489 A.D., August 7.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī śakābdaṁ 1411 ḍaina paumya saṁvatsara śrāvaṇa śudha
11 śu . nāṁḍu . śrīraṁgarājulaku bahubiruda paṁcaghaṁṭavadāta lāṭarāmarā
huttuThe letter ttu is written below the line.laipa dāsūlagōtrulaina kannekaṁṭivallānēniṁgāru vubhayaṁgānu di . 1ki taḷige Āragiṁcanu
dravyaṁ putteṁciri gāna Ācaṁdrā¨rkaṁ voka taḷige Āragiṁpaṁgalavāru . śrīsiṁgaśrīśrī is wrongly written for kṣi.tipālakasya
tanayō nāgādhipaḥ buṇyavān . tatputraḥ kanekaṁṭi mācanṛpatiḥ kī¨rti(ḥ) pratāpōjvalaḥ . tatsūnu(ḥ)
¨rvijitāri bhūpanivahaḥ śrīvallabhakṣmāpatiḥ . gāṁdhārīgirināmakō vijayatē gaṁgātaṭādhīśvaraḥ .
Digital edition of SII 24.642 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
